characters.name: Tempest Flurry
characters.role: Main damage dealer. Scales with Invoker elemental penetration.

characters.name: Falling Thunder
characters.role: Burst damage on shocked enemies. Invoker penetration makes it hit harder.

characters.name: Thunderstorm
characters.role: AoE clear. Needs Shock Conduction II + Overcharge.

characters.name: Orb of Storms
characters.role: Sustained damage. Invoker spell scaling boosts this significantly.

characters.name: Tempest Bell
characters.role: Crowd control and stun. Utility skill.

characters.name: Mana Drain
characters.role: Mana sustain. Essential for sustained combat.

characters.name: Killing Palm
characters.role: Power Charges on cull. Great for campaign with adds.

characters.name: Herald of Thunder
characters.role: Herald. Invoker scales heralds hard. Key endgame skill.

characters.name: Mana Remnants
characters.role: Mana sustain on kill. Pairs with Mana Drain.

upgrades.reason: 100% shock chain across enemies. Cornerstone combo for lightning Monk.
Chain bounces bolts between enemies. AoE expands orb radius.
Boosts shock magnitude from Falling Thunder hits.

key_benefits: Elemental penetration — lightning damage actually lands
Spell scaling — Orb of Storms, Thunderstorm hit harder
Herald scaling — Herald of Thunder becomes endgame powerhouse
Shock magnitude — more shock = more damage across entire kit

upgrades.reason: 100% shock chain across enemies. Cornerstone combo for lightning Monk.
Chain bounces bolts between enemies. AoE expands orb radius.
Boosts shock magnitude from Falling Thunder hits.

Swap when damage is high enough that leech sustains you faster than Parry blocks. Timing: Cruel Act 3+ or Maps. Keep Parry through campaign — it's your 'oh shit' button for boss telegraphs and pack swarms.

key_benefits: Elemental penetration — lightning damage actually lands
Spell scaling — Orb of Storms, Thunderstorm hit harder
Herald scaling — Herald of Thunder becomes endgame powerhouse
Shock magnitude — more shock = more damage across entire kit
Invoker.power_spike: Before Invoker: You deal lightning damage. After Invoker: You deal lightning damage THAT ACTUALLY LANDS.

skills.name: Firebolt
skills.role: Main early-game damage dealer. Spammable fire projectile.

skills.name: Spark
skills.role: Chain lightning for pack clear. Covers fire-immune enemies.

skills.name: Flame Wall
skills.role: Area denial and fire synergy. Projectiles through it gain fire damage.

upgrades.reason: Early gem slots — boost main skill first.
Waller wall = more coverage for Spark/Firebolt to pass through.
